title: Tracker SQLite as source of truth with scoped GitHub sync
body:
Normalized SQLite schema replaces GitHub Issues mirror as the tracker runtime source of truth. Bidirectional sync exports active-version tasks and all bugs; inbound webhooks apply scoped updates.

## What shipped

- Schema v5: versions, workstreams, deliverables, tasks, bugs, outbox, links
- Import API for seed JSON bundles
- Read/write services DB-first; legacy mirror path removed
- Active version rule: prefer In Progress semver, else highest semver

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `tracker-implementation`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`
